name: Jumppit
short_description: Save the frogs and jump over the obstacles to solve the puzzles. Collect the bonus coins and unlock the secret worlds, and even more... Unlock the level maker mode and design your own levels
detailed_description:
This is a very unique puzzle game.

Levels range from very easy to extremely hard.

The expected game time:

4 hours to collect 50 bonus coins.

7 hours to collect 60 bonus coins.

10 hours to collect all 100 bonus coins.

The features of the game are as follows:

1. The game is a single player game.

2. The game uses cartoons graphics with unique ideas and brings you an immersive gaming experience. Every detail is carefully designed to optimise the experience.

3. You can discover new worlds and unlock secret levels.

4. You can Unlock the level maker mode and design your own levels.

5. The game supports multiple handle operations, making your gaming experience more colorful. Whether you like to use the keyboard and mouse or the gamepad, you can find the most suitable operation method for you.

This game will bring you an unprecedented gaming experience, let you find fun and challenging in the game.
